F

fallback - Variable in class com.example.battleship.model.player.HuntShootingStrategy
 
FIN_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
 
findHuntCandidates(Board) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.player.HuntShootingStrategy
Finds every connected cluster of hit cells and collects each one's own hunting candidates.
fireAtMachine(Position) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Game
Resolves a shot fired by the human player at the machine's board.
fitsWithinBoard(Ship) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Board
Whether every cell ship would occupy is within the board's 0-9 range, using Ship.getWidthInColumns() and Ship.getDepthInRows() as the single source of truth for the ship's footprint -- deliberately computed with plain arithmetic rather than by calling Ship.getOccupiedPositions(): that method builds a Position for every segment, and Position's own constructor rejects out-of-range coordinates -- exactly the case being checked for here, so it can't be used to check for it.
FLAG_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
 
FLAG_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
 
FLAG_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
 
FLAME_BASE_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D
 
FLAME_TIP_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D
 
FleetPlacer - Class in com.example.battleship.model
Places a complete fleet of ships onto a board at random valid positions, following the rules (no overlaps, nothing hanging off the edge).
FleetPlacer() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.FleetPlacer
 
FleetViewBuilder - Class in com.example.battleship.controller
Builds the Ship3D shapes matching every Ship already placed on a model Board -- used for the machine's fleet (placed all at once by FleetPlacer, then mirrored into the scene in one pass) and reusable anywhere else a board's ships need a matching set of 3D shapes.
FleetViewBuilder() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.controller.FleetViewBuilder
 
focusCameraForCurrentTurn() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController
Points the camera at whichever board is currently being shot AT -- the opposite board from whoever's turn it is, not the same one.
FONT_SIZE - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D
 
FRAGMENT_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D
 
FRAGMENT_DARK_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D
 
FRAGMENTS - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D
 
FragmentSpec(double, double, double, double, double, boolean) - Constructor for record class com.example.battleship.view.assets.WreckageDebris3D.FragmentSpec
Creates an instance of a FragmentSpec record class.
FRIGATE - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.ship.ShipType
4 per fleet, 1 cell each.
Frigate3D - Class in com.example.battleship.view.ships
Frigate: the smallest ship in the fleet, occupies 1 single cell.
Frigate3D(int, int, Orientation) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
Bow faces -Z; the whole hull is centered on X = 0.
FUNNEL_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Destroyer3D
 
FUNNEL_COLOR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Frigate3D
 
FXML_PATH - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.Main
